title: Line Charts Tracking Planned Progress Vs Actual Progress based on timeline duration.
excerpt: Hi all! I am tracking a construction project from an MEP perspective.  My boards are set up so that the groups are the categories of systems with the specific system as the item and tasks within the installation and test…

posts.author: THyde87 (Tom Hyde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all! I am tracking a construction project from an MEP perspective. My boards are set up so that the groups are the categories of systems with the specific system as the item and tasks within the installation and testing of the system as sub-items.

It is important for our client to monitor planned progress against actual progress. I have the relevant formula columns set to enable a live planned % to be generated based on a task time line duration but the real goal is to be able to see the planned % of the entire project against the timeline of the entire project and also track the actual progress % against this and who knows, maybe a projected actual progress based on the current run rate also. Currently line charts do not support the ability to use the time line across the bottom so I currently can only monitor the planned against actual progress based on the individual groups.
